LanguageData.MLF_Stairs.label: Level teleporter (up)
LanguageData.MLF_Stairs.description:
Connects the ground level and the upper level. Build it inside a roofed room to create a second floor.

The author got tired and used a lazy solution: any teleporter can transport to any other teleporter, regardless of position.
Don’t ask me why stairs can store power. It’s just advanced technology.
LanguageData.MLF_StairsDown.label: Level teleporter (down)
LanguageData.MLF_StairsDown.description:
A level teleporter that leads to the underground. Build it to open up underground space.

The author got tired and used a lazy solution: any teleporter can transport to any other teleporter, regardless of position.
Don’t ask me why stairs can store power. It’s just advanced technology.
